meaning: vi.参加,结合,加入vt.连接,结合,参加,加入n.连接,结合,接合点 [计] 用子目录名取代驱动器符
examples: They may apply to join the organization.
Strangely, they hadn't invited her to join them.
How do these two pieces join?
The seven winners of the play-offs will join hosts Denmark in the finals next year.
He jumped from Morgan Stanley and recruited four junior executives from other firms to join him.
